## Description
Glucose can be used for providing food for bio-organism&#10;&#9;&#9;to work in bio-reactors to produce compounds.

## Characteristics

| Attribute      | Value |
|--------:|:------|
|Edible:|true|
|Type:|Derived|
|Form:|Solid|
